sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88788" key="prosbiasmo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσβῐ-ασμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n88788.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">forcing, straining</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:6:10:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.10.14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
